task_completion.description: Verify the agent fetched or opened the pBR322 cloning vector sequence (Accession: J01749.1) in UGENE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing the J01749.1 sequence loaded, or a search/fetch dialog querying 'J01749.1' from NCBI.

task_completion.description: Verify the pBR322 sequence is saved to ~/UGENE_Data/results/pBR322.gb.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal (e.g., ls command), or UGENE save dialog showing 'pBR322.gb' located in the '~/UGENE_Data/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the human_insulin_gene.gb file in UGENE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE project window or sequence view showing 'human_insulin_gene.gb' loaded alongside the pBR322 sequence.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent inserted the human insulin gene sequence into the pBR322 sequence exactly after nucleotide position 375.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE sequence editor showing an insertion operation, an 'Insert Sequence' dialog specifying position 375, or the cursor/selection placed exactly at position 375 prior to pasting/inserting.

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting recombinant sequence is saved as pBR322_insulin_recombinant.gb in the results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or UGENE save dialog showing 'pBR322_insulin_recombinant.gb' located in '~/UGENE_Data/results/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of cloning_report.txt containing the total length of the final recombinant plasmid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, gedit) or terminal (cat command) displaying the contents of '~/UGENE_Data/results/cloning_report.txt' with a numeric value representing the total base pairs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the UGENE graphical interface to perform the sequence fetch and cloning operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show active interaction with UGENE menus, sequence views, and dialog boxes, rather than just using command-line scripts (like Biopython) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the recombinant sequence was created by actually inserting the insulin gene into pBR322 within UGENE.
integrity.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing the modified sequence with a length greater than the original 4361 bp, indicating a genuine insertion took place.

integrity.description: Verify the length reported in cloning_report.txt matches the actual length of the recombinant sequence generated in UGENE.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value in the text file should match the sequence length visible in the UGENE sequence properties or statistics panel for the recombinant sequence.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The pBR322 cloning vector (Accession J01749.1) has an exact length of 4361 base pairs. The insertion must occur exactly after nucleotide position 375 (the BamHI cut site). The final recombinant sequence length reported in the text file should be exactly 4361 plus the length of the human insulin gene sequence.
